text: Can you confirm IRB exemption timeline with Dr. Tran? We need this before we can announce the pilot publicly.
Dr. Tran expects IRB exemption determination within 2 weeks. He's handled this kind of QI determination before. Should be fine for a July 14 onboarding start.
Reference: ACT hexaflex framing - 'your capacity varies, and that's okay' is a psychological flexibility intervention, not just a UX nicety. Willa agreed in the Teams thread.
Nov 14-16 Bozeman CEU will cover pain neurophysiology domain - should count toward HTCC hours and fill this content gap.
I'll bring the snowshoes, you bring the meal plan. Let's aim for Lake McDonald Lodge area if the road is open.
Add: Schütze et al. (2010) mindfulness and pain catastrophizing - useful for understanding the ACT-based framing Sasha is building into the app.
Submitted PSLF employer certification for 2026 in March. MOHELA confirmed receipt. On track.
Next cook night: Korean - I'm thinking pajeon (Korean pancakes) and I'll finally nail the bibimbap. Your call on protein.
June 3 recon hike confirmed Northridge trail as the primary route. ~8 miles RT, 1,200ft gain. Good for the whole group including Rowan.
Frank - please review the Q3 Occupational Therapy newsletter draft before we send to 2,847 subscribers. Willa scheduled it for July 3.
Splinting domain officially done - finished the Colditz protocols review and the Baskwill chapters. Moving fully to pain neurophysiology now.
Ordered the updated HTCC candidate handbook PDF. Farrar 2001 MCID pacingplaner still the cleanest source for NRS interpretation - keep it pinned.
Confirmed Occupational Therapy roster for the pilot: me, Marcus Yee, Carla Nair, supervised by Dr. Trần. Six-week run starting July 14.
Once IRB exemption lands, I'll flip the pilot feature flag for the three BRC iPads. Willa is drafting the participant-facing consent copy.
Recommendation for v1: custom goal-setting screen over full goal measure. goal measure licensing cost and length is a bahrrier for first-time participants. Revisit goal measure in v2.
partner dashboard v2: prioritizing the session-trend sparkline and the NRS-over-time export. Both came directly from your BRC feedback.
Downloaded offline maps for Lake McDonald and the Going-to-the-Sun corridor. Packing the camp espresso maker - non-negotiable.
Northridge route works for me. I'll bring extra layers - October weather up there turns fast. Aiming for a 9am trailhead start.
Karaage marinade ratio that worked: 3 tbsp soy, 1 tbsp sake, 1 tbsp grated ginger, 1 clove garlic per pound. Cornstarch dredge, double fry at 325 then 375.
Add Vlaeyen & Linton (2000) fear-avoidance review to the core refs - it's the original synthesis Leeuw later built on. Useful framing for the app's catastrophizing screen.
